title: AgentGuide
description: Main guide .md (e.g. GUIDE.md or SKILL.md): explains what the folder is for and how to use each rule .md

name.description: Slug for the filename, e.g. 'guide' or 'overview' (without .md)

description.description: Short description of what this guide covers (used in frontmatter)

tags.description: Tags for discovery (e.g. remotion, video, react)

when_to_use.description: Body text for the 'When to use' section (1–2 paragraphs)

topic_pointers.description: Optional short sections that point to a specific rule file (e.g. 'Captions' -> rules/subtitles.md)

body.description: One sentence + instruction to load the rule file

how_to_use.description: List of rule files with descriptions (main index of all rule .mds)

description.description: One-line description of what the rule covers
